next_non_pr_task: Resolve SERVER_PREP_SIDECAR_BLOCKED before PR193+ worker/server-dependent runtime tasks.
notes: PR190 implements an admin-only read-only bulk review surface at /admin/bulk-review with pagination, search/filter shell, source links, entity scope, and public-signal preview. The page uses the existing admin guard and fail-closes without fixture project rows when the admin data adapter is unavailable. No auto-publish, public route exposure, sitemap change, Public API/MCP release, payment/CRM/email/social flow, deploy, server/cloud mutation, production DB write, worker runtime, data repo mutation, FermatMind mutation, or secret/env read occurred. PR188/PR189 remain SERVER_PREP_SIDECAR_BLOCKED, and PR193+ remains blocked until that sidecar is resolved or the dependency is explicitly reworked.
